foldersEmptyDescription: No folders yet. Run a sync to get started.
composeDisabledTitle: Add an IMAP account to write messages
emptyFilteredDescription: No messages match the current filters.
webhookEmptyDescription: Send your first message via webhook:
emptyDescription: This folder is empty for now.
selectMessageDescription: Click a message on the left to read it
deleteForeverDescription: The message is in the trash and will be permanently deleted.
errorAttachmentTooLarge: Attachment is too large to download
errorAttachmentUnavailable: The attachment will be available after syncing
errorFolderMismatch: Destination folder does not belong to this account
errorSendNotAllowed: Sending messages is only available for IMAP accounts
errorSendRateLimit: Message sending limit exceeded. Please try again later.
moreLabelsAriaLabel: {count, plural, one {# more label} other {# more labels}}
labelPickerDescription: Add or remove workspace labels for this message.
errorUpdateMessageLabels: Failed to update message labels. Try again.
errorLabelResourceNotFound: The message or label is no longer available.
filterRuleDialogDescription: Create a rule for future incoming messages using a sender, subject text, or both.
filterRuleSenderDescription: Sender matching ignores case and surrounding whitespace.
filterRuleSubjectDescription: Optional text that must appear in the subject. Matching ignores case and surrounding whitespace.
filterRuleAndDescription: When sender and subject are both filled, the message must match both.
filterRuleApplyExistingDescription: Optional. Existing inbox messages are processed safely in the background.
labelCustomColorDescription: Use a six-digit hex color, for example #2563EB.
validationLabelColorInvalid: Enter a valid six-digit hex color.
manageLabelsDescription: Create workspace labels, choose their colors, and control their order.
labelEditorDescription: Names identify labels; color provides an additional visual cue.
labelsManagerEmptyDescription: Create a label with a name and color to organize mail.
deleteLabelDescription: The label will be removed from messages. Labels used by filters cannot be deleted.
errorCreateLabel: Failed to create the label. Try again.
errorUpdateLabel: Failed to update the label. Try again.
errorReorderLabel: Failed to reorder the label. Try again.
errorDeleteLabel: Failed to delete the label. Try again.
errorLabelInUse: This label is used by a filter or active existing-mail run.
errorLabelDefinitionNotFound: This label is no longer available.
labelsEmptyDescription: Create a label while saving this rule.
filterRuleDeletedToast: Filter rule deleted. Existing message labels were kept.
errorCreateFilterRule: Failed to create filter rule. Please try again.
errorUpdateFilterRule: Failed to update the filter rule. Try again.
errorDeleteFilterRule: Failed to delete the filter rule. Try again.
manageFilterRulesDescription: Rules for {account}. Changes affect future incoming messages only.
errorLoadFilterRules: Failed to load filter rules. Try again.
filterRulesEmptyDescription: Open a message and choose Filter messages like this to create one.
filterRunDialogDescription: Status of this rule's application to existing inbox messages.
filterRunFailedDescription: Processing stopped after {attempts} consecutive failures. Retry keeps committed progress.
filterRunStatusErrorDescription: The latest progress could not be loaded. Refresh to try again.
filterRunPollingPausedDescription: Processing continues in the background. Refresh to load the latest progress.
errorRetryFilterRun: Failed to retry existing mail processing.
errorFilterRunNotRetryable: Only failed existing mail processing can be retried.
editFilterRuleDescription: Update the criteria and target label for future incoming messages.
deleteFilterRuleDescription: Delete {rule}? Labels already applied to messages will remain.
errorLoadLabels: Failed to load labels. Please try again.
errorLabelNameConflict: A label with this name already exists.
errorLabelLimitReached: This workspace has reached its label limit.
errorRuleLimitReached: This account has reached its active-rule limit.
errorFilterResourceNotFound: The account or label is no longer available.
errorOwnerRequired: Only workspace owners can manage labels and filter rules.
validationLabelNameTooLong: Label names can contain at most 40 characters.
validationRuleNameTooLong: Rule names can contain at most 80 characters.
validationSenderTooLong: Sender can contain at most 320 characters.
validationSubjectTooLong: Subject text can contain at most 200 characters.
validationRulePredicateRequired: Enter a sender or subject text.
validationRuleUpdateRequired: Change at least one rule field.
